title: Sara Blakely: SPANX CEO on Writing Your Billion Dollar Story
excerpts:
Section Title: Sara Blakely > SPANX CEO on Writing Your Billion Dollar Story
Content:
Share: [](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?url=https://lewishowes.com/podcast/sara-blakely-spanx-ceo-on-writing-your-billion-dollar-story/&text=“What you don’t know can be your greatest asset if you let it.” -@SPANX) [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=https://lewishowes.com/podcast/sara-blakely-spanx-ceo-on-writing-your-billion-dollar-story/&text=“What you don’t know can be your greatest asset if you let it.” -@SPANX)
During this interview, I kept finding out new things to admire Sara for.
She struggled a lot in school (me too!). She sold fax machines door to door FOR 7 YEARS before she had the idea for Spanx. She was rejected by every manufacturing company she took her idea to.
But she didn’t let any of that stop her.
Sara’s hustle and can-do attitude is just one thing I learned about her in this interview.

title: Business Is Not a Battlefield with SPANX’s Sara Blakely | Lemonada Media
excerpts:
Section Title: Business Is Not a Battlefield with SPANX’s Sara Blakely > Transcript
Content:
So then the next day, I flipped on the news, and it was Gayle King, and I was running out the door to Spanx, but I caught, like, two minutes of the morning news before I headed out, and she was interviewing Christian Louboutin, which was very odd, right? Like hard news morning. And so I was like, I just asked for a sign, and this is really weird, so I paid extra attention, and in that interview, which Gail holds up her shoe, takes it off her foot and holds it up in the air and goes, I love this shoe. It’s a work of art, but I gotta tell you, by the end of the day, I could be crippled. And as a product person, I’m watching this right? And all I care about is, how does she feel? How does she feel? Are you happy? Do you feel good? You know I’m expecting him to go. I know I’m working on it. And instead, he said, I do not want my shoe to be comfortable. If my shoe is comfortable, I take it as an ins

title: From Selling Fax Machines to Becoming the Youngest Self-Made Female Billionaire: A Conversation with CEO and Spanx Founder Sara Blakely | Salesforce
excerpts:
Section Title: From Selling Fax Machines to Becoming the Youngest Self-Made Female Billionaire: A Conversation w...
Content:
Transcript
**Sara Blakely:** I believe that you don't have to act serious to be taken seriously. And I think that there can be a lot of silliness, and a lot of joy, and a lot of laughing at yourself, and still a lot of amazing results, and earning respect, and delivering and exceeding customer's expectations.
**Michael Rivo:** That was Sara Blakely, the CEO and founder of Spanx. Welcome back to Blazing Trails, I'm Michael Rivo from Salesforce Studios. Today we'll hear how Sara went from selling fax machines door to door, to creating a billion dollar fashion empire. But before we get to the interview, let me welcome Marie Rosecrans, senior vice president of SMB Marketing at Salesforce, who interviewed Sara as part of our Stories of Resilience program. Welcome to the show Marie.
**Marie Rosecrans:** Thank you so much Michael. Appreciate the opportunity to be here.

title: What Interviewing Sara Blakely Taught Me - Susie Moore
excerpts:
Section Title: What Interviewing Sara Blakely Taught Me
Content:
[Pin 149](https://pinterest.com/pin/create/button/?url=https://susie-moore.com/interview/sara-blakely-interview/&media=https%3A%2F%2Fsusie-moore.com%2Fwp-content%2Fuploads%2F2015%2F10%2Fsara-blakely-interview.jpg&description=What+Interviewing+Sara+Blakely+Taught+Me+via+%40susie-moore.com)
[Tweet](https://twitter.com/intent/tweet?text=What+Interviewing+Sara+Blakely+Taught+Me&url=https%3A%2F%2Fsusie-moore.com%2Finterview%2Fsara-blakely-interview%2F&via=susiemoore)

149 Shares
A couple of years ago I had the honor of chatting with billionaire [Spanx](https://www.spanx.com) Founder, Sara Blakely for an hour. She was amazing. It was one of the most eye opening conversations of my life and lessons she taught me will stick with me forever.

title: Business Is Not a Battlefield … - Confessions of a Female Founder with Meghan - Apple Podcasts
excerpts:
Section Title: Business Is Not a Battlefield with SPANX’s Sara Blakely
Content:
[Confessions of a Female Founder with Meghan](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/confessions-of-a-female-founder-with-meghan/id1803670198)
Play
On today’s episode, Meghan sits down with Sara Blakely, the founder of SPANX, who turned $5,000 in savings into a billion-dollar brand that redefined shapewear. In this conversation, the pair get real about betting on yourself, and building bold business strategies. Sara also opens up about starting from scratch again—this time with her latest venture: a shoe line called Sneex.
Follow Meghan @Meghan and Sara @SaraBlakely on Instagram. Stay up to date with us @LemonadaMedia on X, Facebook, and Instagram.
For a list of current sponsors and discount codes for this and every other Lemonada show, go to lemonadamedia.com/sponsors.
